findings.description: s1 section content references `SQLException#getErrorCode` in the transactionTimeoutErrorCodeList property description, but `SQLException` is absent from s1's hints list. It appears only in s2's hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: 'transactionTimeoutErrorCodeList — ベンダー依存の例外コード (SQLException#getErrorCodeから取得できる値)'. Knowledge file s1 content: '（`SQLException#getErrorCode`の値、複数指定可）'
